bundle.shortDescription: Catch Hamburg tourists in retro 16-bit style.
bundle.longDescription: Poketour is a single-player retro creature collector set in Hamburg's Karolinenviertel. Walk the Heiligengeistfeld, Messehallen, Reeperbahn and Millerntor; capture tourist archetypes (Sport-, OMR-, Internorga-, Dom-, Reeperbahn-Tourist…) into your Touristen-Kodex. Each species is gated by a real Hamburg event window, so the calendar drives the game world.
